meta.description: Synthetic dummy attack pattern for cybersecurity simulation in Docker environments
meta.warning: FOR SIMULATION USE ONLY — Do not use against real infrastructure

name: ARP Spoofing / Man-in-the-Middle
description: Attacker broadcasts fake ARP replies to poison the ARP cache of hosts, redirecting traffic through attacker node.

attack_stages.action: Send gratuitous ARP: victim's IP → attacker MAC
Send gratuitous ARP: gateway IP → attacker MAC
All victim↔gateway traffic routes through attacker

indicators_of_compromise: Duplicate IP addresses in ARP table
Unexpected traffic volumes through single host
